001package net.okocraft.box.api.util;
002
003import org.jetbrains.annotations.ApiStatus;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006import java.util.concurrent.Executor;
007
008/**
009 * An interface for providing {@link Executor}s.
010 */
011@Deprecated(forRemoval = true)
012@ApiStatus.ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion = "4.2.0")
013public interface ExecutorProvider {
014
015    /**
016     * Gets an executor, not server's main-thread.
017     *
018     * @return an {@link Executor}
019     */
020    @NotNull Executor getExecutor();
021
022    /**
023     * Gets a server's main-thread.
024     *
025     * @return a server's main-thread
026     */
027    @NotNull Executor getMainThread();
028
029}
